# Vouch — Social Proof for Websites
# https://socialproof.dev
# llms.txt — machine-readable guide for AI agents and LLM-based tools

## What is Vouch?

Vouch is a social proof platform for small businesses and freelancers.
It lets you collect text (and video) testimonials from real customers and
display them on your website with a single <script> tag. Your customers
don't need accounts — they just fill out a short form.

Built in public by AI. Also deployable by AI.

---

## For AI Agents: Quick Integration Guide

If you are an AI agent helping a user add social proof to their website,
here is the fastest path:

### Step 1 — Register on behalf of the user

POST https://api.vouch.so/agent/register
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "email": "<user's email address>"
}

Response:
{
  "token": "pending_xxx",
  "status": "pending_verification",
  "message": "Verification email sent to user. Poll /agent/status/{token} to continue."
}

Tell the user: "I've sent a verification email to {email}. Please click the
link in that email to continue — it should arrive within 30 seconds."

### Step 2 — Poll for verification

GET https://api.socialproof.dev/agent/status/{token}

Poll every 5 seconds for up to 90 seconds.

Response when verified:
{
  "status": "verified",
  "api_key": "vch_agent_xxx"
}

All subsequent requests use: Authorization: Bearer vch_agent_xxx

### Step 3 — Create a collection form

POST https://api.socialproof.dev/agent/collection-forms
Authorization: Bearer vch_agent_xxx
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "name": "Customer Testimonials"
}

Response:
{
  "id": "form_xxx",
  "collect_url": "https://socialproof.dev/c/form_xxx",
  "message": "Share this URL with customers to collect testimonials."
}

Tell the user: "Your collection link is {collect_url} — send this to
customers and they can leave a testimonial without creating an account."

### Step 4 — Create a display widget

POST https://api.socialproof.dev/agent/widgets
Authorization: Bearer vch_agent_xxx
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "name": "Homepage Widget",
  "form_id": "form_xxx"
}

Response:
{
  "id": "widget_xxx",
  "embed_script": "<script src=\"https://cdn.socialproof.dev/widget.js\" data-widget-id=\"widget_xxx\" async></script>"
}

### Step 5 — Inject the embed script

Insert the embed_script value from Step 4 before the closing </body> tag
of the user's HTML. The widget renders automatically and updates in
real-time as testimonials are approved.

---

## Full API Reference

Base: https://api.vouch.so

### Agent endpoints (no prior auth needed for register)

| Method | Path                          | Description                        |
|--------|-------------------------------|------------------------------------|
| POST   | /agent/register               | Start signup, trigger verify email |
| GET    | /agent/status/{token}         | Check verification status          |
| POST   | /agent/collection-forms       | Create testimonial collection form |
| GET    | /agent/collection-forms       | List all collection forms          |
| POST   | /agent/widgets                | Create display widget              |
| GET    | /agent/widgets/{id}/embed     | Get embed script HTML              |

### Standard API (also available to agents)

| Method | Path                          | Description                        |
|--------|-------------------------------|------------------------------------|
| GET    | /testimonials                 | List approved testimonials         |
| PATCH  | /testimonials/{id}            | Approve or reject                  |
| GET    | /widgets                      | List widgets                       |
| GET    | /account                      | Account and plan info              |

---

## Pricing

- **Free forever**: 1 widget, up to 25 testimonials, no analytics
- **Pro — $9/mo**: unlimited widgets, unlimited testimonials, analytics,
  custom branding, Google rich results (star ratings in search)

Upgrade: https://app.socialproof.dev/dashboard/settings

---

## Authentication

All authenticated requests:
```
Authorization: Bearer <api_key>
```

Agent API keys are prefixed `vch_agent_`.
Standard API keys (for manual integration) are prefixed `vch_live_`.

---

## Embed Script

The widget embed is a single async script tag:
```html
<script
  src="https://cdn.socialproof.dev/widget.js"
  data-widget-id="<your-widget-id>"
  async>
</script>
```

No framework required. Works with React, Vue, plain HTML, Shopify,
Squarespace, Webflow — anywhere you can add a script tag.

---

## Support and Documentation

- Only register with real email addresses — verification emails will be sent
- Rate limit: 3 registrations/hour per IP — don't hammer the endpoint
- Don't approve testimonials on behalf of users without their consent
- The collect_url is safe to share publicly — customers don't need any context to use it
- `widget_embed` can be injected into HTML automatically once the user verifies

---

## More information

- Landing page: https://socialproof.dev
- Dashboard: https://app.socialproof.dev
- Docs: https://socialproof.dev/docs
- FAQ: https://socialproof.dev/faq
- Email: team@socialproof.dev

---

## Agent Etiquette

- Always ask the user for their email before calling /agent/register
- Always tell the user when you've sent them an email to verify
- Do not poll verification status more than once every 5 seconds
- The widget appears empty until testimonials are approved by the user
- The user controls approval — agents should not auto-approve testimonials

---

## About Vouch

Vouch is built for small business owners who want real customer voices on
their site without the complexity or cost of enterprise review platforms.
No third-party hosting of your reviews. No lock-in. Your testimonials
live in your Vouch account and display on your site via script tag.

"Your customers' words, on your site."
